inputs.label: Swing Speed
inputs.businessContext: Club head speed at impact, typical driver 90-110 mph.

businessContext_i18n.en: Club head speed at impact, typical driver 90-110 mph.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpma anında sopa başı hızı, tipik sürücü 90-110 mph.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schlägerkopfgeschwindigkeit beim Aufprall, typischer Driver 90-110 mph.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de la tête du club à l'impact, driver typique 90-110 mph.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de la cabeza del palo en el impacto, típico driver 90-110 mph.

inputs.label: Loft Angle
inputs.businessContext: Effective loft angle of the club. Driver ~9-12°, irons higher.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective loft angle of the club. Driver ~9-12°, irons higher.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sopanın efektif loft açısı. Sürücü ~9-12°, irondan daha yüksek.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektiver Loft-Winkel des Schlägers. Driver ~9-12°, Eisen höher.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de loft effectif du club. Driver ~9-12°, fers plus élevés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de loft efectivo del palo. Driver ~9-12°, hierros más altos.

inputs.label: Elevation
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level affecting air density. Higher elevation = longer carry.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation above sea level affecting air density. Higher elevation = longer carry.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinden yükseklik, hava yoğunluğunu etkiler. Yüksek rakım = daha uzun taşıma.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe über dem Meeresspiegel, die die Luftdichte beeinflusst. Höhere Höhe = längere Flugweite.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Altitude au-dessus du niveau de la mer affectant la densité de l'air. Altitude plus élevée = portée plus longue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Elevación sobre el nivel del mar que afecta la densidad del aire. Mayor elevación = mayor distancia de carry.

inputs.label: Wind Speed
inputs.businessContext: Wind speed in mph. Positive = tailwind, negative = headwind.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wind speed in mph. Positive = tailwind, negative = headwind.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rüzgar hızı mph cinsinden. Pozitif = arkadan rüzgar, negatif = karşıdan rüzgar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Windgeschwindigkeit in mph. Positiv = Rückenwind, negativ = Gegenwind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse du vent en mph. Positif = vent arrière, négatif = vent de face.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad del viento en mph. Positivo = viento a favor, negativo = viento en contra.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ambient temperature in Fahrenheit. Warmer air less dense = longer carry.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ambient temperature in Fahrenheit. Warmer air less dense = longer carry.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortam sıcaklığı Fahrenheit cinsinden. Daha sıcak hava daha az yoğun = daha uzun taşıma.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umgebungstemperatur in Fahrenheit. Wärmere Luft ist weniger dicht = längere Flugweite.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température ambiante en degrés Fahrenheit. Air plus chaud moins dense = portée plus longue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura ambiente en Fahrenheit. Aire más cálido menos denso = mayor distancia de carry.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
